title: ads-and: NAND-based author name disambiguation for SAO/NASA ADS publication metadata
description: ads-and is a Python package and command-line tool for author name disambiguation on SAO/NASA ADS publication metadata. Given publications and optionally references in ADS parquet format, it assigns stable author identifiers and writes disambiguated outputs. The bundled model is a packaged and refined version of NAND (Neural Author Name Disambiguator), evaluated on the LSPO benchmark for physics and astronomy author name disambiguation.
notes: Cite the original NAND paper when discussing the underlying method, and cite LSPO separately when discussing the benchmark or dataset (see related works below).
